scoring_criteria.3: Fully correct: accurate, complete, with sources
scoring_criteria.2: Mostly correct: core info right, missing details or sources
scoring_criteria.1: Partially correct: has errors or important omissions

questions.question_zh: ChatOpenAI 的 temperature 参数默认值是多少？
questions.question_en: What is the default value of the temperature parameter in ChatOpenAI?
questions.rationale: 单页面精确查询，向量召回直接命中 API 参考

questions.question_zh: RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter 的默认 chunk_size 是多少？
questions.question_en: What is the default chunk_size of RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter?
questions.rationale: 纯参数查询，三方案都能答但 RAG 最便宜

questions.question_zh: LangSmith 的免费 plan 每月有多少 traces 额度？
questions.question_en: How many traces does the LangSmith free plan include per month?
questions.rationale: 三方案都能答，重点演示成本差异

questions.question_zh: BaseChatMessageHistory 类有哪些必须实现的抽象方法？
questions.question_en: What abstract methods must be implemented when subclassing BaseChatMessageHistory?
questions.rationale: 单页面列表查询，RAG 强项

questions.question_zh: LangGraph 的 interrupt 函数在哪个版本引入？
questions.question_en: In which version of LangGraph was the interrupt function introduced?
questions.rationale: 陷阱题：看似单跳但版本信息在 release notes，与功能说明分离

questions.question_zh: 用 LCEL 把 RunnablePassthrough 和 ChatPromptTemplate 串起来需要注意什么？
questions.question_en: What should I know when chaining RunnablePassthrough with ChatPromptTemplate via LCEL?
questions.rationale: 入门级多跳：三个组件的协作关系

questions.question_zh: 我想用 LangGraph 实现一个 agent，让它在调用工具失败时自动重试 3 次，需要哪些组件配合？
questions.question_en: I want to build a LangGraph agent that automatically retries 3 times when tool calls fail. What components do I need?
questions.rationale: 3-4 跳关系链，组件依赖图清晰，GraphRAG 主场

questions.question_zh: ConversationBufferMemory 已经被废弃了，对应的新方案是什么？它和 LangGraph 的 MemorySaver 有什么关系？
questions.question_en: ConversationBufferMemory is deprecated. What replaces it, and how does it relate to LangGraph's MemorySaver?
questions.rationale: 版本演进关系链：废弃 → 替代 → 新生态
questions.source_hint: Memory deprecation + new approach + LangGraph Memory

questions.question_zh: LangSmith 的 @traceable 装饰器和 LangChain 的 callbacks 系统是什么关系？
questions.question_en: What is the relationship between LangSmith's @traceable decorator and LangChain's callbacks system?

questions.question_zh: 我用 LangServe 部署了一个 chain，前端能不能直接调用？需要做什么配置？
questions.question_en: I deployed a chain with LangServe. Can the frontend call it directly? What configuration is needed?
questions.rationale: 反转题：多跳但需要动态验证步骤，Agentic 优于 GraphRAG

questions.question_zh: AgentExecutor（旧）和 LangGraph 的 agent（新）在功能上有什么差异？我应该选哪个？
questions.question_en: What are the differences between AgentExecutor (legacy) and LangGraph's agent (new)? Which should I choose?
questions.rationale: 新旧方案对比，PM 经典命题，Agentic 主场
questions.source_hint: Legacy AgentExecutor + LangGraph agents + migration guide

questions.question_zh: LangChain 支持哪些向量数据库？哪个最适合生产环境？
questions.question_en: What vector databases does LangChain support? Which is best for production?
questions.rationale: 穷举型问题：需遍历多个集成页面并对比

questions.question_zh: 我想做一个能联网搜索的 agent，LangChain 和 LangGraph 各自怎么做？哪个更好？
questions.question_en: I want to build an agent that searches the web. How does LangChain vs LangGraph approach this? Which is better?
questions.rationale: 跨子项目 + 跨工具综合

questions.question_zh: LangChain 的 Document Loaders 和 Retrievers 各自能做什么？它们怎么配合？
questions.question_en: What do LangChain's Document Loaders and Retrievers each do? How do they work together?
questions.rationale: 平局题：故意放一道无明显赢家的题，提升评测可信度

questions.question_zh: LangChain 官方教程里构建 RAG 应用推荐哪种 chunking 策略？这个推荐随时间变过吗？
questions.question_en: What chunking strategy does the official LangChain tutorial recommend for RAG? Has this recommendation evolved over time?
questions.rationale: 反转题：RAG 在'历史演变'问题上盲区，Agentic 能主动查 changes
questions.source_hint: RAG tutorials + chunking strategy + historical versions

demo_star_sequence.role: 成本对比开场——建立量级差异认知
GraphRAG 高光时刻——展示图遍历可视化
Agentic 综合能力——PM 经典命题共鸣
RAG 翻车诚实题——证明研究客观
平局展示（可选）——诚实性加分
